text_original: This is one of the best AI chats I've been able to find. The AI is creative and adaptive. You can tell any story you want. My biggest complaint is that there's no age verification for XXX material. The developers made this app PG for everyone. The AI won't swear, it won't use graphic descriptions of genitalia, and it won't even use swear words. This AI Chat is safe for kids and teens, however I wish the developers would release an XXX version, because this is one of the best Chat models.
text_zh: 这是我能找到的最好的AI聊天工具之一。这个AI很有创意，适应性也很强。你可以讲述任何你想讲的故事。我最大的不满是对于成人内容没有年龄验证。开发人员把这个应用设定为适合所有人的PG级别。AI不会说脏话，不会对生殖器官进行生动描述，甚至连脏词都不用。这个AI聊天对儿童和青少年是安全的，但我希望开发人员能发布一个成人版本，因为这是最好的聊天模型之一。
reply_original:
Thank you for your high praise! It's wonderful to hear you find our AI creative and adaptive for your storytelling. 

Regarding your feedback on content restrictions, we must maintain strict filters to comply with Google Play's safety policies. This ensures the app remains available for everyone.
reply_zh:
感谢您的高度评价！很高兴听到您认为我们的人工智能在故事创作中具有创意和适应性。

关于您对内容限制的反馈，我们必须保持严格的过滤机制，以遵守 Google Play 的安全政策。这确保了应用程序能够持续面向所有人开放。
